channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Chest of drawers dumped, 10th June
item.description:
This has been dumped fo4 4 weeks Bin men not taking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Bursdon Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bike fronting 1, Cator Rd, Penge - eyesore, obstacle and hazard to blind and partially sighted persons, 10th June
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bike fronting 1, Cator Rd, Penge - eyesore, obstacle and hazard to blind and partially sighted persons. Seen 4.30pm Wednesday 10/6/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cator Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on school markings and double yellows, 10th June
item.description:
No point in having parking restrictions if there’s nobody there to police them. Bromley council could make a fortune if they were there to ticket all the school run parents with their Range Rovers, Mercedes and 4x4 SUVs blocking up the road picking up their kids from the nursery. Parking on so called “time restricted” parts of the road . Also Blocking private driveways.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped in bushes, 10th June
item.description:
A household sofa has been dumped in bushes on the corner of Highmead and Edison Grove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highmead, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fronting 10, Cator Rd, Penge - about 6m of footway is uneven tarmac from a now-removed tree root system. Please remove the old roots and re-pave the footway flat, preferably with matching pink flagstones, 10th June
item.description:
Fronting 10, Cator Rd, Penge - about 6m of footway is uneven tarmac from a now-removed tree root system. Please remove the old roots and re-pave the footway flat, preferably with matching pink flagstones Please edge the future site of the replacement tree nicely, thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cator Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown unit has been removed, 10th June
item.description:
Bus stop replaced and the countdown unit hasn't been refitted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

…the reference is in pic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Vale, East Greenwich, Greater London

item.title: Broken drain civer, 10th June
item.description:
A broken drain cover is causing a significant hazard to traffic
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shieldhall Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding acriss the whole road and pavement both sides of the road, 10th June
item.description:
Flooding across bith sides of carriageway and on both pavements. Cars having to slow right down and pedestrians getting very wet
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in park, 10th June
item.description:
This fix has been in the same position when I noticed it last Friday 5th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellow lines for school pick up, 10th June
item.description:
Bromley council could make an absolute fortune if they patrolled the double yellow lines along this road at school pick up time. Please send officers down to enforce the “no parking”
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overgrown at base, 10th June
item.description:
Trees are overgrown and are now impeding pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Stafford Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slab broken, 10th June
item.description:
The paving slab is broken into 4 pieces. Someone is going to get hurt if they trip over it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Standard Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 meter pothole, 10th June
item.description:
Quite a lot more down this road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Budleigh Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garage area badly flooding!, 10th June
item.description:
Despite getting an email saying problem solved the garages between 176/164 and 162/150 Mangold Way ARE STILL FLOODING! Water (sewage) is also coming out of the manhole cover with serious cracks appearing. Are you going to wait for major issue/damage to cars/property before acting!!!!! 🥵🥵🥵

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Middle Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th June
item.description:
Similar items to fly tipping on Lincoln Road. E.g. Black plastic/leather effect chair and other rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Illingworth Way, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near Sheringham Rd, 10th June
item.description:
Please fill

item.title: Drug paraphernalia in from of council house, 10th June
item.description:
In front of 13/15 Nevill Road. Please remove, kids play in this garden

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
